required_protocol_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
assignment: Progression work in the shared publishing clone, using Claude Luna high as the writing engine in safe mode. Repair release-facing documentation and package contract gaps without touching source code, tests, scripts, generated dist, .okra, or PR state. Add current-major Lite and SDK migration evidence; align the root README diagram, Lite and SDK README/PATTERNS, observability and canonical examples with the final explicit ctx.exec/scope.run contract; remove stale material, cliWorker, facade, captured dependency, and obsolete codemod shapes; make the three failing TypeScript fences syntactically valid while preserving meaning; add changeset coverage for logging, observable, scheduler, sync, and lite-react; and include CHANGELOG.md in the 16 affected published package file lists. Do not document or expose MCP/tool collection work. Use inferred handles and explicit deps/params in every example. Do not pass ctx or scope as callback arguments.

budget_and_stop_rule.stop: Stop when the assigned docs/package gaps are repaired or when shipped code cannot support a statement. Do not commit or update the PR.

output_schema: Changed path list, gap-by-gap disposition, exact checks run, remaining contract metrics, and wall reads. Writer evidence is not acceptance.
